name: Dying Water
short_description: Sail through oceans of blood and survive what lurks beneath the waves. A slow burn retro horror game inspired by Voices of The Void.
detailed_description:
All of our water has turned into blood, humanity is doomed. As The Sailor, you must deliver payloads to ports across the North Sea, kepping Them alive, while also mainteining and furnishing your ship. Survive and explore the ruins of mankind while experiencing the effects of the Dying Water Plague and all the horror that comes with it. 

Main Features:

  • Explore the proceduraly generated ocean with the unmaned submarine;

  • Manage resources and plan out your voyages;

  • Explore diverse and unique islands;

  • There's nothing in the sky;

  • Buy and sell valuable and mysterious loot;

  • Furnish the cargo ship as you wish:

  • The horror is based around building dread and paranoia;

  • Long and relaxing voyages;

  • Kill The Witness;

  • Inspired by Voices of The Void, Babbdi, The Long Drive and Iron Lung.
